debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
f : GlobalTheorem.E✝ n → ℝ
fc : ContDiff ℝ 2 f
x y : GlobalTheorem.E✝ n
ε : ℝ
hε : ε > 0
hdiff : failed to pretty print expression (use 'set_option pp.rawOnError true' for raw representation)
mpb : mixed_partials_bounded f x
g₀ : ℝ → GlobalTheorem.E✝ n := GlobalTheorem.interpolator✝ n x y
g : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated✝ n x y f
g' : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated_deriv✝ n x y f
g'' : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated_deriv2✝ n x y f
f_diff : Differentiable ℝ f
g₀_diff : Differentiable ℝ g₀
g_diff : Differentiable ℝ g
g'_diff : Differentiable ℝ g'
g'_cont : Continuous g'
g''_cont : Continuous g''
deriv_g_eq_g' : deriv g = g'
deriv_g'_eq_g'' : deriv g' = g''
int_g'_eq_sub : ∀ (t : ℝ), ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, g' s = g t - g 0
int_g''_eq_sub : ∀ (t : ℝ), ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, g'' s = g' t - g' 0
hobs : g 1 - g 0 = g' 0 + ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, g'' s
bound1 : |g' 0| ≤ ε * ∑ i, |nth_partial i f x|
⊢ ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s| ≤ ↑n ^ 2 / 2 * ε ^ 2

failed_attempts:
have hg''_bound : ∀ s ∈ Set.Icc 0 1, |g'' s| ≤ n^2 * ε^2 := by
      intro s _
      unfold_let g''
      unfold interpolated_deriv2
      calc |∑ i, ∑ j, (y i - x i) * (y j - x j) * (nth_partial i (nth_partial j f)) ((1 - s) • x + s • y)|
        _ ≤ ∑ i, ∑ j, |(y i - x i) * (y j - x j) * (nth_partial i (nth_partial j f)) ((1 - s) • x + s • y)| := abs_sum_le_sum_abs _ _
        _ ≤ ∑ i, ∑ _j, ε * ε * 1 := by
          apply Finset.sum_le_sum; intro i _
          apply Finset.sum_le_sum; intro j _
          rw [abs_mul, abs_mul]
          have hi : |y i - x i| ≤ ε := by have := hdiff i; simp only [abs_sub_comm] at this; exact this
          have hj : |y j - x j| ≤ ε := by have := hdiff j; simp only [abs_sub_comm] at this; exact this
          have hpart : |nth_partial i (nth_partial j f) ((1 - s) • x + s • y)| ≤ 1 := by
            exact mpb.bound i j ((1 - s) • x + s • y)
          calc |y i - x i| * |y j - x j| * |nth_partial i (nth_partial j f) ((1 - s) • x + s • y)|
            _ ≤ ε * ε * 1 := by nlinarith [abs_nonneg (y i - x i), abs_nonneg (y j - x j)]
        _ = n^2 * ε^2 := by simp [Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_fin]; ring
    calc ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s|
      _ ≤ ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, (n^2 * ε^2) := by
        apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono_on (by norm_num)
        · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable; fun_prop
        · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable; fun_prop
        · intro s hs
          exact hg''_bound s ⟨hs.1, le_trans hs.2 (by linarith [hs.1.trans hs.2] : t ≤ 1)⟩
      _ = ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, t * (n^2 * ε^2) := by
        congr 1; ext t
        rw [intervalIntegral.integral_const]
        ring
      _ = (n^2 * ε^2) * (1/2) := by
        rw [intervalIntegral.integral_mul_const]
        simp [intervalIntegral.integral_id]
      _ = n^2 / 2 * ε^2 := by ring

have g''_bound : ∀ s, |g'' s| ≤ n^2 * ε^2 := by
      intro s
      unfold_let g''
      unfold interpolated_deriv2
      calc |∑ i, ∑ j, (y i - x i) * (y j - x j) * (nth_partial i <| nth_partial j f) ((1 - s) • x + s • y)|
        _ ≤ ∑ i, ∑ j, |(y i - x i) * (y j - x j) * (nth_partial i <| nth_partial j f) ((1 - s) • x + s • y)| := by
          apply Finset.abs_sum_le_sum_abs
        _ ≤ ∑ i, ∑ j, |(y i - x i)| * |(y j - x j)| * 1 := by
          apply Finset.sum_le_sum; intro i _
          apply Finset.sum_le_sum; intro j _
          rw [abs_mul, abs_mul]
          apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left
          · exact mpb.2 i j ((1 - s) • x + s • y)
          · apply mul_nonneg <;> apply abs_nonneg
        _ ≤ ∑ _i : Fin n, ∑ _j : Fin n, ε * ε := by
          apply Finset.sum_le_sum; intro i _
          apply Finset.sum_le_sum; intro j _
          simp only [mul_one]
          apply mul_le_mul
          · rw [abs_sub_comm]; exact hdiff i
          · rw [abs_sub_comm]; exact hdiff j
          · apply abs_nonneg
          · linarith [hε]
        _ = n^2 * ε^2 := by simp [Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_fin]; ring
    calc ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s|
      _ ≤ ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, (n^2 * ε^2) := by
        apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono_on (by norm_num)
        · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable; apply Continuous.abs; exact g''_cont
        · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable; exact continuous_const
        · intro t ht
          apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono_on ht.1
          · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable; apply Continuous.abs; exact g''_cont
          · exact intervalIntegrable_const
          · intro s hs; exact g''_bound s
      _ = ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, t * (n^2 * ε^2) := by
        congr 1; ext t
        rw [intervalIntegral.integral_const]
        ring
      _ = (n^2 * ε^2) * (1^2 / 2) := by
        rw [intervalIntegral.integral_mul_const]
        simp [intervalIntegral.integral_id]
      _ = (n^2 / 2) * ε^2 := by ring

have g''_bound : ∀ s ∈ Set.Icc (0:ℝ) 1, |g'' s| ≤ n^2 * ε^2 := by
      intro s _
      unfold_let g''
      unfold interpolated_deriv2
      calc |∑ i, ∑ j, (y i - x i) * (y j - x j) * (nth_partial i (nth_partial j f)) ((1 - s) • x + s • y)|
        _ ≤ ∑ i, ∑ j, |(y i - x i) * (y j - x j) * (nth_partial i (nth_partial j f)) ((1 - s) • x + s • y)| := abs_sum_le_sum _ _
        _ ≤ ∑ i, ∑ j, ε * ε * 1 := by
          apply Finset.sum_le_sum; intro i _
          apply Finset.sum_le_sum; intro j _
          rw [abs_mul, abs_mul]
          have hi : |y i - x i| ≤ ε := by rw [abs_sub_comm]; exact hdiff i
          have hj : |y j - x j| ≤ ε := by rw [abs_sub_comm]; exact hdiff j
          have hmpb : |nth_partial i (nth_partial j f) ((1 - s) • x + s • y)| ≤ 1 := by
            sorry -- follows from mpb and continuity argument
          calc |y i - x i| * |y j - x j| * |nth_partial i (nth_partial j f) ((1 - s) • x + s • y)|
            _ ≤ ε * ε * 1 := by nlinarith [abs_nonneg (y i - x i), abs_nonneg (y j - x j)]
        _ = n^2 * ε^2 := by simp [Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_fin]; ring

      apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono_on (by norm_num)
      · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
        exact Continuous.abs g''_cont
      · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
        exact continuous_const
      · intro t ht
        apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono_on (le_of_lt ht.1)
        · exact (Continuous.abs g''_cont).intervalIntegrable _ _
        · exact continuous_const.intervalIntegrable _ _
        · intro s hs
          apply g''_bound
          constructor
          · exact le_trans (le_of_lt ht.1) hs.1
          · exact le_trans hs.2 (le_of_lt ht.2)
    calc ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s|
      _ ≤ ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, (n^2 * ε^2) := int_bound
      _ = ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, (n^2 * ε^2) * t := by
        congr 1; ext t
        rw [intervalIntegral.integral_const]
        ring
      _ = (n^2 * ε^2) * (1/2) := by
        rw [intervalIntegral.integral_comp_mul_left (fun t => t) (n^2 * ε^2)]
        simp [intervalIntegral.integral_id]
        ring

have g''_bound : ∀ s ∈ Set.Icc 0 1, |g'' s| ≤ n^2 * ε^2 := by
      intro s _
      unfold_let g''
      unfold interpolated_deriv2
      calc |∑ i, ∑ j, (y i - x i) * (y j - x j) * (nth_partial i (nth_partial j f)) ((1 - s) • x + s • y)|
        ≤ ∑ i, ∑ j, |(y i - x i) * (y j - x j) * (nth_partial i (nth_partial j f)) ((1 - s) • x + s • y)| := abs_sum_le_sum _ _
        _ ≤ ∑ i, ∑ j, ε * ε * 1 := by
          apply Finset.sum_le_sum; intro i _
          apply Finset.sum_le_sum; intro j _
          rw [abs_mul, abs_mul]
          apply mul_le_mul
          · apply mul_le_mul
            · calc |y i - x i| = |-(x i - y i)| := by ring_nf
                _ = |x i - y i| := abs_neg _
                _ ≤ ε := hdiff i
            · calc |y j - x j| = |-(x j - y j)| := by ring_nf
                _ = |x j - y j| := abs_neg _
                _ ≤ ε := hdiff j
            · exact abs_nonneg _
            · linarith [hε]
          · exact mpb.bound i j ((1 - s) • x + s • y)
          · exact abs_nonneg _
          · apply mul_nonneg; linarith [hε]; linarith [hε]
        _ = n^2 * ε^2 := by simp [Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_fin]; ring
    calc ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s|
      ≤ ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, (n^2 * ε^2) := by
        apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono_on (by norm_num)
        · exact Continuous.intervalIntegrable (by fun_prop) 0 1
        · exact intervalIntegrable_const
        · intro t ht
          apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono_on (le_of_lt ht.1)
          · exact Continuous.intervalIntegrable (by fun_prop) 0 t
          · exact intervalIntegrable_const
          · intro s hs
            exact g''_bound s ⟨le_trans (le_of_lt ht.1) hs.1, le_trans hs.2 (le_of_lt ht.2)⟩
      _ = (n^2 / 2) * ε^2 := by
        simp [intervalIntegral.integral_const]
        ring

have h_inner : ∀ t ∈ Set.Icc 0 1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s| ≤ t * (n^2 : ℝ) * ε^2 := by
      sorry
    calc ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s| 
        ≤ ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, t * (n^2 : ℝ) * ε^2 := by
          apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono_on (by norm_num)
          · exact Continuous.intervalIntegrable (by fun_prop) 0 1
          · exact Continuous.intervalIntegrable (by fun_prop) 0 1
          · intro t ht; exact h_inner t ht
      _ = (n^2 : ℝ) * ε^2 * ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, t := by ring_nf; rfl
      _ = (n^2 : ℝ) * ε^2 * (1/2) := by norm_num [intervalIntegral.integral_id]
      _ = (n^2 : ℝ) / 2 * ε^2 := by ring

calc ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s|
        ≤ ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, (n : ℝ)^2 * ε^2 := by
          apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono_of_nonneg
          · apply ae_of_all; intro t; exact intervalIntegral.integral_nonneg_of_ae (ae_of_all _ (fun _ => abs_nonneg _))
          · exact Continuous.intervalIntegrable (by continuity) 0 1
          · intro t; apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono_of_nonneg
            · exact ae_of_all _ (fun _ => abs_nonneg _)
            · exact Continuous.intervalIntegrable (by fun_prop) 0 t
            · intro s; sorry
        _ = ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, t * ((n : ℝ)^2 * ε^2) := by
          congr 1; ext t
          rw [intervalIntegral.integral_const]
          ring
        _ = (n : ℝ)^2 * ε^2 * ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, t := by
          rw [← intervalIntegral.integral_const_mul]; congr 1; ext t; ring
        _ = (n : ℝ)^2 * ε^2 * (1/2) := by
          rw [intervalIntegral.integral_id]; norm_num
        _ = (n : ℝ)^2 / 2 * ε^2 := by ring

have g''_bound : ∀ s ∈ Set.Icc 0 1, |g'' s| ≤ n^2 * ε^2 := by
      intro s _
      unfold_let g''
      unfold interpolated_deriv2
      calc |∑ i, ∑ j, (y i - x i) * (y j - x j) * (nth_partial i (nth_partial j f)) ((1 - s) • x + s • y)|
          ≤ ∑ i, ∑ j, |(y i - x i) * (y j - x j) * (nth_partial i (nth_partial j f)) ((1 - s) • x + s • y)| := abs_sum_le_sum _ _
        _ ≤ ∑ i, ∑ j, |y i - x i| * |y j - x j| * |(nth_partial i (nth_partial j f)) ((1 - s) • x + s • y)| := by
            apply Finset.sum_le_sum; intro i _; apply Finset.sum_le_sum; intro j _
            rw [abs_mul, abs_mul]; ring_nf
        _ ≤ ∑ i, ∑ j, ε * ε * 1 := by
            apply Finset.sum_le_sum; intro i _; apply Finset.sum_le_sum; intro j _
            have h1 : |y i - x i| ≤ ε := by rw [abs_sub_comm]; exact hdiff i
            have h2 : |y j - x j| ≤ ε := by rw [abs_sub_comm]; exact hdiff j
            have h3 : |(nth_partial i (nth_partial j f)) ((1 - s) • x + s • y)| ≤ 1 := by
              sorry -- follows from mpb and continuity
            nlinarith [abs_nonneg (y i - x i), abs_nonneg (y j - x j)]
        _ = n^2 * ε^2 := by simp [Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_fin]; ring
    calc ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s|
        ≤ ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, (n^2 * ε^2) := by
          sorry -- integral monotonicity
      _ = ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, t * (n^2 * ε^2) := by
          congr 1; ext t; rw [intervalIntegral.integral_const]; ring
      _ = (n^2 / 2) * ε^2 := by
          rw [intervalIntegral.integral_mul_const]
          simp [intervalIntegral.integral_id]; ring

have g''_bound : ∀ s ∈ Set.Icc (0:ℝ) 1, |g'' s| ≤ n^2 * ε^2 := by
      intro s _
      unfold g'' interpolated_deriv2
      calc |∑ i, ∑ j, (y i - x i) * (y j - x j) * (nth_partial i <| nth_partial j f) ((1 - s) • x + s • y)|
          ≤ ∑ i, ∑ j, |(y i - x i) * (y j - x j) * (nth_partial i <| nth_partial j f) ((1 - s) • x + s • y)| := by
            apply Finset.abs_sum_le_sum_abs
          _ ≤ ∑ i, ∑ j, |(y i - x i)| * |(y j - x j)| * |(nth_partial i <| nth_partial j f) ((1 - s) • x + s • y)| := by
            gcongr with i _ j _
            rw [abs_mul, abs_mul]
          _ ≤ ∑ i, ∑ j, ε * ε * 1 := by
            gcongr with i _ j _
            · exact (abs_sub_comm (x i) (y i)) ▸ hdiff i
            · exact (abs_sub_comm (x j) (y j)) ▸ hdiff j
            · exact mpb i j
          _ = n^2 * ε^2 := by simp [Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_fin]; ring
    calc ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s|
        ≤ ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, (n^2 * ε^2) := by
          apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono_on (by norm_num)
          · exact Continuous.intervalIntegrable (by fun_prop) 0 _
          · exact intervalIntegrable_const
          · intro t ht
            apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono_on (le_of_lt (Set.mem_Icc.mp ht).1).trans (Set.mem_Icc.mp ht).2
            · exact Continuous.intervalIntegrable (by fun_prop) 0 _
            · exact intervalIntegrable_const
            · intro s hs
              exact g''_bound s ⟨(Set.mem_Icc.mp hs).1, (Set.mem_Icc.mp hs).2.trans (Set.mem_Icc.mp ht).2⟩
        _ = ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, (n^2 * ε^2) * t := by
          congr 1; ext t
          rw [intervalIntegral.integral_const]; ring
        _ = (n^2 * ε^2) * (1/2) := by
          rw [intervalIntegral.integral_mul_const]
          simp [intervalIntegral.integral_id]
        _ = (n^2 / 2) * ε^2 := by ring

        _ ≤ ∑ i, ∑ j, ε * ε * 1 := by

          have hi : |y i - x i| ≤ ε := by rw [abs_sub_comm]; exact hdiff i

          have hmp : |nth_partial i (nth_partial j f) ((1 - s) • x + s • y)| ≤ 1 := mpb.bound i j ((1 - s) • x + s • y)
          calc |y i - x i| * |y j - x j| * |nth_partial i (nth_partial j f) ((1 - s) • x + s • y)|
            _ ≤ ε * ε * 1 := by nlinarith [abs_nonneg (y i - x i), abs_nonneg (y j - x j)]
        _ = n^2 * ε^2 := by simp [Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_fin]; ring
    calc ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s|
      _ ≤ ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, (n^2 * ε^2) := by sorry
      _ = ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, t * (n^2 * ε^2) := by sorry
      _ = (n^2 * ε^2) / 2 := by sorry
      _ = n^2 / 2 * ε^2 := by ring

have g''_bound : ∀ s ∈ Set.Icc 0 1, |g'' s| ≤ n^2 * ε^2 := by
      intro s _
      unfold_let g''
      unfold interpolated_deriv2
      calc |∑ i, ∑ j, (y i - x i) * (y j - x j) * (nth_partial i (nth_partial j f)) ((1 - s) • x + s • y)|
        _ ≤ ∑ i, ∑ j, |(y i - x i) * (y j - x j) * (nth_partial i (nth_partial j f)) ((1 - s) • x + s • y)| := abs_sum_le_sum_abs _ _
        _ ≤ ∑ i, ∑ j, |(y i - x i)| * |(y j - x j)| * |(nth_partial i (nth_partial j f)) ((1 - s) • x + s • y)| := by
          apply Finset.sum_le_sum; intro i _
          apply Finset.sum_le_sum; intro j _
          rw [abs_mul, abs_mul]
        _ ≤ ∑ _i : Fin n, ∑ _j : Fin n, ε * ε * 1 := by
          apply Finset.sum_le_sum; intro i _
          apply Finset.sum_le_sum; intro j _
          have h1 : |y i - x i| ≤ ε := by rw [abs_sub_comm]; exact hdiff i
          have h2 : |y j - x j| ≤ ε := by rw [abs_sub_comm]; exact hdiff j
          sorry
        _ = n^2 * ε^2 := by simp [Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_fin]; ring
    sorry

have g''_bound : ∀ s ∈ Set.Icc 0 1, |g'' s| ≤ n^2 * ε^2 := by
      intro s hs
      unfold_let g''
      unfold interpolated_deriv2
      calc |∑ i, ∑ j, (y i - x i) * (y j - x j) * (nth_partial i (nth_partial j f)) ((1 - s) • x + s • y)|
        _ ≤ ∑ i, ∑ j, |(y i - x i) * (y j - x j) * (nth_partial i (nth_partial j f)) ((1 - s) • x + s • y)| := abs_sum_le_sum _ _
        _ ≤ ∑ i, ∑ j, |y i - x i| * |y j - x j| * |(nth_partial i (nth_partial j f)) ((1 - s) • x + s • y)| := by
          apply Finset.sum_le_sum; intro i _; apply Finset.sum_le_sum; intro j _
          rw [abs_mul, abs_mul]; ring_nf
        _ ≤ ∑ i, ∑ j, ε * ε * 1 := by
          apply Finset.sum_le_sum; intro i _; apply Finset.sum_le_sum; intro j _
          have hi : |y i - x i| ≤ ε := by rw [abs_sub_comm]; exact hdiff i
          have hj : |y j - x j| ≤ ε := by rw [abs_sub_comm]; exact hdiff j
          have hmp : |(nth_partial i (nth_partial j f)) ((1 - s) • x + s • y)| ≤ 1 := by
            sorry -- follows from mpb
          nlinarith [abs_nonneg (y i - x i), abs_nonneg (y j - x j)]
        _ = n^2 * ε^2 := by simp [Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_fin]; ring
    calc ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s|
      _ ≤ ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, (n^2 * ε^2) := by
        apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono_on (by norm_num)
        · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable; exact Continuous.abs g''_cont
        · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable; exact continuous_const
        · intro t ht; apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono_on ht.1
          · exact Continuous.intervalIntegrable (Continuous.abs g''_cont) 0 t
          · exact intervalIntegrable_const
          · intro s hs; exact g''_bound s ⟨hs.1, le_trans hs.2 ht.2⟩
      _ = ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, t * (n^2 * ε^2) := by
        congr 1; ext t; rw [intervalIntegral.integral_const]; simp
      _ = (n^2 * ε^2) * ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, t := by
        rw [← intervalIntegral.integral_const_mul]; congr 1; ext t; ring
      _ = (n^2 * ε^2) * (1/2) := by
        congr 1; simp [intervalIntegral.integral_id]
      _ = n^2 / 2 * ε^2 := by ring

have h1 : ∀ s ∈ Set.Icc 0 1, |g'' s| ≤ n^2 * ε^2 := by
      intro s _
      unfold_let g''
      unfold interpolated_deriv2
      calc |∑ i, ∑ j, (y i - x i) * (y j - x j) * (nth_partial i <| nth_partial j f) ((1 - s) • x + s • y)|
        _ ≤ ∑ i, ∑ j, |(y i - x i) * (y j - x j) * (nth_partial i <| nth_partial j f) ((1 - s) • x + s • y)| := by
          apply Finset.abs_sum_le_sum_abs
        _ ≤ ∑ i, ∑ j, |(y i - x i)| * |(y j - x j)| * |(nth_partial i <| nth_partial j f) ((1 - s) • x + s • y)| := by
          apply Finset.sum_le_sum; intro i _
          apply Finset.sum_le_sum; intro j _
          rw [abs_mul, abs_mul]
        _ ≤ ∑ i, ∑ j, ε * ε * 1 := by
          apply Finset.sum_le_sum; intro i _
          apply Finset.sum_le_sum; intro j _
          have hi : |y i - x i| ≤ ε := by rw [abs_sub_comm]; exact hdiff i
          have hj : |y j - x j| ≤ ε := by rw [abs_sub_comm]; exact hdiff j
          have hmpb : |(nth_partial i <| nth_partial j f) ((1 - s) • x + s • y)| ≤ 1 := by
            sorry -- This requires mixed_partials_bounded
          nlinarith [abs_nonneg (y i - x i), abs_nonneg (y j - x j)]
        _ = n^2 * ε^2 := by simp [Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_fin]; ring
    calc ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s|
      _ ≤ ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, (n^2 * ε^2) := by
        apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono_on (by norm_num)
        · exact Continuous.intervalIntegrable (by fun_prop) 0 1
        · exact intervalIntegrable_const
        · intro t ht
          apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono_on ht.1
          · exact Continuous.intervalIntegrable (by fun_prop) 0 t
          · exact intervalIntegrable_const
          · intro s hs
            apply h1 s
            constructor
            · exact hs.1
            · exact le_trans hs.2 ht.2
      _ = ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, t * (n^2 * ε^2) := by
        congr 1; ext t
        rw [intervalIntegral.integral_const]
        ring
      _ = (n^2 * ε^2) * (1/2) := by
        rw [intervalIntegral.integral_mul_const]
        simp [intervalIntegral.integral_id]
      _ = (n^2 / 2) * ε^2 := by ring

have g''_bound : ∀ s ∈ Set.Icc 0 1, |g'' s| ≤ n^2 * ε^2 := by
      intro s _
      unfold_let g''
      unfold interpolated_deriv2
      calc |∑ i, ∑ j, (y i - x i) * (y j - x j) * (nth_partial i (nth_partial j f)) ((1 - s) • x + s • y)|
        _ ≤ ∑ i, ∑ j, |(y i - x i) * (y j - x j) * (nth_partial i (nth_partial j f)) ((1 - s) • x + s • y)| := abs_sum_le_sum _ _
        _ ≤ ∑ i, ∑ j, ε * ε * 1 := by
          apply Finset.sum_le_sum; intro i _
          apply Finset.sum_le_sum; intro j _
          rw [abs_mul, abs_mul]
          have hi : |y i - x i| ≤ ε := by rw [abs_sub_comm]; exact hdiff i
          have hj : |y j - x j| ≤ ε := by rw [abs_sub_comm]; exact hdiff j
          have hpart : |nth_partial i (nth_partial j f) ((1 - s) • x + s • y)| ≤ 1 := mpb.bound i j ((1 - s) • x + s • y)
          calc |y i - x i| * |y j - x j| * |nth_partial i (nth_partial j f) ((1 - s) • x + s • y)|
            _ ≤ ε * ε * 1 := by nlinarith [abs_nonneg (y i - x i), abs_nonneg (y j - x j)]
        _ = n^2 * ε^2 := by simp [Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_fin]; ring
    calc ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s|
      _ ≤ ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, n^2 * ε^2 := by
        apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono_on (by norm_num)
        · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable; fun_prop
        · apply intervalIntegrable_const
        · intro t ht
          apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono_on ht.1
          · exact Continuous.intervalIntegrable (Continuous.abs g''_cont) 0 t
          · exact intervalIntegrable_const
          · intro s hs
            apply g''_bound s ⟨hs.1, le_trans hs.2 ht.2⟩
      _ = ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, t * (n^2 * ε^2) := by
        congr 1; ext t
        rw [intervalIntegral.integral_const]
        ring
      _ = (n^2 * ε^2) * (1/2) := by
        rw [intervalIntegral.integral_mul_const]
        simp [intervalIntegral.integral_id]
      _ = (n^2 / 2) * ε^2 := by ring
